---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happens instead.

## Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Android 13)
- **Browser**: (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126, Safari 17)
- **Device**: (e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15)
- **App Version / Commit**: (e.g. `main` branch, commit `abc1234`)

## Additional Context

Any other information that might be relevant.
